**Transport Name**
Full name of the protocol/tool.

**Protocol**
TCP/UDP/QUIC/Other

**Why this transport?**
What advantage does it offer over existing options?

**Reference Implementation**
Link to the official project or RFC.

**Would you like to implement it?**
Let us know if you'd like to work on this.
